items.title: Briefing Pages use a dual-mode renderer
items.summary: A combined Briefing Page includes Newspaper and Narrative modes in one standalone HTML file.
items.content_text: The renderer uses reviewed Structured Synthesis, a header mode switch, dual mode containers, and a footer source index.

items.title: Source indexes keep evidence visible without turning pages into audits
items.summary: Briefing pages should keep a complete source index while preserving editorial reading flow.
items.content_text: The source index supports traceability, while DSL-provided Evidence Links keep the page readable without body-level source controls.

items.title: Narrative mode should not become a Show Script
items.summary: Narrative Briefing prose is for silent reading and must not include host turns or spoken pacing.
items.content_text: The narrative mode flows across Artifact Topics with DSL-provided Evidence Links and drop-cap transitions rather than host labels.
